title: oSzoukaua's: Lucky Blocks
description:
oSzoukaua's: Lucky blocks

This is a datapack created by me, oSzoukaua, based on the original mod by the name "Lucky Blocks" 

This Datapack adds craftable Lucky blocks with varying Luck levels, and a lot of possible different "Events"
body:
# Description: This is a datapack created by me, **oSzoukaua**, based on the original mod by the name "**Lucky Blocks**"
This Datapack adds craftable Lucky blocks, with varying Luck levels from [+100] - [-100] They can be crafted by surrounding a dispenser with either gold blocks, for a 0 Luck block, or you can replace some gold blocks with either coal blocks, or singular diamonds to increase or decrease luck
Includes a lot of possible different "Events" for each level of luck From **amazingly awesome!** to *frustratingly annoying.*
This Datapack also adds many other features such as Lucky beacons, when you place a Lucky Block ontop of a powered Beacon, and many others! that can be gotten through Events from the Lucky Blocks.



## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side



This Datapack is currently using a system where a resource pack is not required or needed for convenience of use, but it still manages adds custom block "textures" This may change in the future.

*I do not take any ownership or credit for the idea or original creation of the "Lucky Blocks" concept*

This is by no means an optimized Datapack, as it is my first Datapack that I have created/worked on, and i have not worked with commands since Version "**1.8.9**" though I have put my best effort into making it run smoothly without hiccups!

## Other:


You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.
